An aquatic version of the [[MVR-3 speeder bike]], the '''mini-sub''', adapted by the [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]] cathedral factories, saw action in underwater battles during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TNEGTD" />

==Characteristics==
The mini-sub had armor protection for the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], as well as a single, large [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. They were transported to underwater battlefields inside specialized [[Separatist Sub-Carrier|carriers]].<ref name="CWC5" />

==History==
Many of these underwater craft were ripped to shreds by the [[Keelkana/Legends|riding beasts]] of the [[Mon Calamari Knights/Legends|Mon Calamari Knights]].<ref name="CWC5" />

The [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]] provided underwater conversion kits for the [[MVR-3 speeder bike]] to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] as compensation for the Xi Char failing to figure out how to make the [[manta droid subfighter]] transform like the [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid starfighter]].<ref name="TNEGTD" />
